_comment: Copy this file to athlete.json and fill in your details. Run 'jezr setup' for guided generation, or paste the prompt from the README into your AI of choice.
_note: Remove all _comment and _note fields from your personal athlete.json — they are documentation only.
name: Your name

goals._comment: Primary goal is your next A-race or key target. Long-term is your bigger ambition beyond that.

primary.distance: e.g. Marathon, Half Marathon, 70.3, Century Ride

goals.long_term: e.g. Sub-3 marathon before age 43, complete an Ironman

current_block._comment: What phase of training are you in right now, and what does a typical week look like.
current_block.phase: e.g. Base building, Build, Peak, Taper, Recovery, Off-season

thresholds._comment: Set these from your Intervals.icu Sport Settings. Threshold pace is per km. FTP is in watts.

pace_conventions._comment: Integer percentages of threshold pace used in planned workouts. These are the defaults — adjust if your coach uses different zones.

ride_conventions._comment: Integer percentages of FTP used in planned ride workouts.

sports._comment: Which sports are active in your training right now.

injury_history._comment: List significant past injuries. Used to avoid repeating patterns that caused problems before.

items.notes: e.g. Grade 2 strain, 6 weeks off, tends to tighten when mileage spikes

risk_flags: _comment: Remove this line. List things to actively avoid in planning.
e.g. Conservative mileage increases — no more than 10% week on week
e.g. Avoid hard runs the day after hard Zwift efforts

preferred_training_days._comment: Which days you typically train and what fits on each. Leave blank if flexible.

constraints: _comment: Remove this line. List regular scheduling constraints.
e.g. Frequent interstate and international travel — weeks regularly disrupted
e.g. Early morning runner — sessions before 7am

equipment.bike: e.g. Road bike + Zwift trainer setup

fuelling._comment: What works for you in training and racing. Be specific — this context improves plan and feedback quality.
fuelling.race_day: e.g. High5, Precision Fuel pouches, Maurten gels — targeting ~82g carbs/hour
fuelling.long_run: e.g. Gel every 45min from 60min onwards, 500ml electrolyte per hour
fuelling.notes: e.g. Previous GI issues at high carb intake — resolved with current protocol

environment._comment: Where and when you typically train. Important for contextualising pace and HR data.
environment.typical_conditions: e.g. Temperate, training in 15-25°C most of the year
environment.heat_tolerance: e.g. Acclimatised — regular training in 28-35°C Brisbane and Sydney summers
environment.typical_terrain: e.g. Flat road and bike path, occasional hilly trail

preferences._comment: How you like your training structured and communicated. These are injected as hard constraints into every planning prompt.
preferences.workout_format: distance — use km-based segments (e.g. 5km, 12km), never minutes
preferences._workout_format_note: Or set to 'time — use minute-based segments (e.g. 30min, 45min)' if preferred
preferences.feedback_style: e.g. Direct and data-driven — no generic encouragement
preferences.planning_philosophy: e.g. Conservative and injury-averse — consistency over hero sessions
